headline: Electronic Components & Manufacturing Stocks Q1 Results: Benchmarking Amphenol (NYSE:APH)
summary: As the Q1 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the electronic components & manufacturing industry, including Amphenol (NYSE:APH) and its peers.

headline: Qnity Earnings Surpass Estimates in Q1, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: Q beats Q1 earnings estimates, as AI-related demand and strong interconnect growth lift sales 18% y/y and drive a higher 2026 outlook.
